title: Zebkit configuration
description: Build, theme, component, pruning, and agent-context settings for Zebkit.

configVersion.description: Zebkit config format version required by this release.

$schema.description: Path or URL to the Zebkit config JSON Schema used by the editor.

tokens.description: Token, CSS, theme, overlay, font, and pruning build settings.

destinationPath.description: Directory where compiled CSS and optional token artifacts are written.

assetFilePath.description: Public asset URL prefix used when compiling asset references into CSS.

basePreset.description: Bundled theme preset used as the base token set.

tokenPath.description: Token override file or directory layered over the base preset.

themeName.description: Output theme name used in generated filenames.

overlays.description: Scoped overlay themes emitted alongside the base theme.

tokenPath.description: Token override file or directory for this overlay.

themeName.description: Overlay name used in its filename and default selector.

rootSelector.description: Selector that scopes the overlay. Defaults to [data-zbk-theme="<themeName>"].

destinationPath.description: Overlay output directory. Defaults to the base destinationPath.

fonts.description: Controls how configured Google Fonts are delivered.

strategy.description: Google Fonts delivery: import emits CSS @imports; link/preload write an HTML head sidecar; manual emits no remote font loading.

exportTokens.description: Write authorable token artifacts alongside compiled CSS.

exportStrict.description: Also emit spec-only strict-mode token documents + a drop-manifest (D9). Requires exportTokens.

splitMode.description: Write one token export per format or one per token module.

outputFormats.description: Token export formats written when exportTokens is enabled.

writeAllowedTokenTypes.description: Write the allowed token-type vocabulary as JSON.

writeTokenLookup.description: Write the token alias lookup map as JSON.

writeVariantRegistry.description: Write the compiled component variant registry.

tokenLookupOutputPath.description: Custom output path for the token lookup map.

extendedTokens.description: Controls optional primitive palettes, responsive utilities, and breakpoint vars.

colors.description: Include every primitive palette or only families referenced by the token graph.

breakpoints.description: Responsive utility breakpoints: true for all, false for none, or an allowlist.

emitBreakpointVars.description: Emit --zbk-breakpoint-* custom properties for JavaScript consumers.

typeScale.description: Controls fluid or static font-size scale generation.

static.description: Emit authored static values instead of the generated fluid scale.

fluid.description: Generate a viewport-responsive scale. Setting this to false enables static mode.

spaceScale.description: Controls fluid or static spacing scale generation.

static.description: Emit authored static values instead of the generated fluid scale.

fluid.description: Generate a viewport-responsive scale. Setting this to false enables static mode.

fonts.description: Controls how configured Google Fonts are delivered.

strategy.description: Google Fonts delivery: import emits CSS @imports; link/preload write an HTML head sidecar; manual emits no remote font loading.

enabled.description: Prune unused CSS during a normal Zebkit build.

content.description: Content globs scanned for used classes and tokens.

safelist.description: Exact classes or /regex/ patterns that pruning must retain.

blocklist.description: Exact classes or /regex/ patterns that pruning must remove.

output.description: Controls whether pruned CSS replaces or accompanies the canonical CSS.

mode.description: Replace the canonical CSS or write a separate pruned file.

path.description: Output path used in alongside mode.

tokens.description: Trim unreachable design tokens in addition to selectors.

componentCss.description: Component-layer pruning mode. Version 1 supports keep.

report.description: Write a JSON report describing the pruning result.

components.description: Per-component inclusion. Use false to exclude, true to include, or an object with a shipped-variant allowlist.

oneOf.description: Include or exclude the component and all of its shipped variants.
Include the component with an optional shipped-variant allowlist.

variants.description: Shipped variant names to include. An empty array includes no shipped variants.

path.description: Destination for generated context, or false to disable it.
